things.name: Old Town (Altstadt)
things.description: Medieval old town on both banks of the Limmat with winding lanes and guild houses

things.name: Lake Zurich
things.description: Beautiful lake with boat trips, swimming spots and mountain backdrop

things.name: Kunsthaus Zurich
things.description: Switzerland's largest art museum with Giacometti, Munch and exceptional Impressionist works

things.name: Bahnhofstrasse
things.description: One of the world's most exclusive shopping streets running from the main station to the lake

things.name: Grossmunster
things.description: Romanesque-style Protestant church with stained glass by Augusto Giacometti

things.name: Fraumunster
things.description: Former abbey church with five stunning stained-glass windows by Marc Chagall

things.name: Swiss National Museum
things.description: Comprehensive collection of Swiss cultural history in a fairy-tale castle

things.name: Zurich Zoo
things.description: Highly rated zoo with Masoala Rainforest hall and Lewa Savanna African exhibit

things.name: Lindenhugel Hill
things.description: Hillside park with a landmark fountain and great views over the Limmat valley

things.name: Rietberg Museum
things.description: Outstanding collection of non-European art including African, Asian and ancient American
